title: tanacetum pseudoparthenium
intro: Tanacetum pseudoparthenium, commonly known as false chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum pseudoparthenium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Tanacetum pseudoparthenium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
